problem.summary: Cover key/value radix sort as a hipCUB/rocThrust competitor and as a reusable primitive for routing, sparse metadata, and sampling.
constraints: Template-only; hipCUB DeviceRadixSort temporary-storage and allocation boundary must be recorded
Tie and stability semantics must match the oracle
Custom attempts should state fixed key width and distribution assumptions

verification.method: Implement the baseline, optimized candidate, and CPU or library oracle; compare all outputs across edge cases before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
